title: Enterprise Compliance AI Agents Platform
description: Enterprise-grade multi-agent AI platform for financial fraud detection and regulatory compliance using Azure AI Foundry and Databricks Lakehouse architecture.
long_description: This project demonstrates how enterprise organizations can automate financial compliance workflows using AI agents. The system uses Azure AI Foundry models to analyze transactions, detect fraud risks, generate compliance reports, and trigger fraud alerts. The platform integrates Databricks Lakehouse for data ingestion and analysis while Azure AI Foundry powers the decision-making agents.
